founder.name: Raj Patel
founder.bio: Serial pitch author. Buzzword-heavy positioning, no shipped product.

company.name: Slopana
company.one_liner: AI-powered blockchain synergy platform for the creator-economy metaverse.

content.note: No product, no code, no team beyond the founder. Deck is buzzword salad (AI + blockchain + metaverse + creator economy) with no specific problem, customer, or wedge. Crowded, undifferentiated.

content.text: Slopana is going to disrupt the $250B creator economy with AI + blockchain synergy. Waitlist open!
content.author: rajpatelweb3
